notes: Hand-labeled ground truth. Seeded manually, intended to be expanded over time with real failure cases pulled from production regressions. Do not generate new cases with an LLM.

cases.input: I was charged $49.99 twice this month, can you refund the duplicate charge?
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests a refund for a duplicate subscription charge.
cases.notes: Clear billing intent

cases.input: My invoice from last month shows the wrong plan tier, I'm on Basic not Pro.
cases.expected_summary: Customer reports their invoice reflects the wrong subscription tier.

cases.input: Can you send me a copy of my receipt from March for tax purposes?
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests a copy of a past receipt.

cases.input: Why did my subscription price go up without any warning?
cases.expected_summary: Customer is asking why their subscription price increased unexpectedly.

cases.input: I want to cancel my subscription and get a prorated refund for the unused days.
cases.expected_summary: Customer wants to cancel and receive a prorated refund.

cases.input: The coupon code SPRING20 isn't applying at checkout.
cases.expected_summary: Customer's discount coupon code is not applying at checkout.
cases.notes: Could be read as technical (checkout bug) but core intent is pricing

cases.input: My card on file expired, how do I update my payment method?
cases.expected_summary: Customer needs to update an expired payment method.

cases.input: I never authorized this charge, this looks like fraud on my card.
cases.expected_summary: Customer disputes an unauthorized charge, suspecting fraud.

cases.input: Do you offer annual billing with a discount instead of monthly?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks about annual billing discount options.

cases.input: I upgraded my plan yesterday but I'm still being billed at the old rate.
cases.expected_summary: Customer's plan upgrade isn't reflected in their billing rate.

cases.input: The dashboard crashes every time I try to export a CSV file.
cases.expected_summary: Customer's dashboard crashes when exporting a CSV file.

cases.input: I'm getting a 500 error whenever I try to upload a profile picture.
cases.expected_summary: Customer receives a 500 error uploading a profile picture.

cases.input: The search bar returns zero results even for terms I know exist in my data.
cases.expected_summary: Customer's search feature returns no results for valid terms.

cases.input: Your mobile app freezes on the loading screen after the latest update.
cases.expected_summary: Customer's mobile app freezes on load after an update.

cases.input: The API is returning stale data, it hasn't updated in 3 days.
cases.expected_summary: Customer reports the API is returning outdated data.

cases.input: Charts on my analytics page are rendering blank, just white space.
cases.expected_summary: Customer's analytics charts render as blank white space.

cases.input: Notifications stopped working after I changed my timezone setting.
cases.expected_summary: Customer's notifications stopped after changing timezone settings.
cases.notes: Touches settings but root complaint is a functional bug

cases.input: The integration with Slack keeps disconnecting every few hours.
cases.expected_summary: Customer's Slack integration disconnects intermittently.

cases.input: Bulk delete only removes half the selected items and then errors out.
cases.expected_summary: Customer's bulk delete feature partially fails with an error.

cases.input: The site is painfully slow, pages take 10+ seconds to load today.
cases.expected_summary: Customer reports significant site-wide slowness.

cases.input: I can't log in, it keeps saying my password is incorrect even after resetting it twice.
cases.expected_summary: Customer cannot log in despite resetting their password twice.

cases.input: How do I change the email address associated with my account?
cases.expected_summary: Customer wants to update their account email address.

cases.input: My account got locked after too many failed login attempts, please unlock it.
cases.expected_summary: Customer's account is locked and needs to be unlocked.

cases.input: I want to permanently delete my account and all associated data.
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests permanent account and data deletion.

cases.input: Can I merge two accounts I accidentally created with different emails?
cases.expected_summary: Customer wants to merge two duplicate accounts.

cases.input: Two-factor authentication isn't sending codes to my phone anymore.
cases.expected_summary: Customer isn't receiving two-factor authentication codes.
cases.notes: Could be read as technical bug; account-security intent dominates

cases.input: I need to transfer account ownership to a coworker before I leave the company.
cases.expected_summary: Customer wants to transfer account ownership to a coworker.

cases.input: My username shows up as 'undefined' on my public profile.
cases.expected_summary: Customer's username displays incorrectly as 'undefined' on their profile.
cases.notes: Could be technical bug OR account profile issue; primary intent is profile data

cases.input: How do I add a second team member to manage the account with me?
cases.expected_summary: Customer wants to add a team member to manage the account.

cases.input: I never got the verification email when I signed up.
cases.expected_summary: Customer did not receive their account verification email.

cases.input: Just wanted to say the new dashboard redesign looks great, nice work!
cases.expected_summary: Customer compliments the new dashboard redesign.

cases.input: Do you have a public roadmap I can follow for upcoming features?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks whether a public product roadmap exists.

cases.input: We're a 200-person company evaluating your product against competitors, can we get a call with sales?
cases.expected_summary: Prospective customer requests a sales call for enterprise evaluation.

cases.input: Do you have an affiliate or partner program?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks about affiliate or partner program availability.

cases.input: Not sure who to ask, but is there a status page for outages?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks whether a status page for outages exists.
cases.notes: Mentions outages but is asking about a resource, not reporting a bug

cases.input: I'd love to see dark mode added to the app at some point.
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests a dark mode feature.

cases.input: What's the difference between your Starter and Growth plans?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks about differences between two pricing plans.
cases.notes: Mentions plans but is a pre-sales feature question, not a billing problem

cases.input: Are you hiring? I'd love to work on a product like this.
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks if the company is hiring.

cases.input: hey
cases.expected_summary: Customer sent a message with no discernible request.
cases.notes: Extremely short, no actionable content

cases.input: Following up on my last email, any update?
cases.expected_summary: Customer follows up on a previous, unspecified email.
cases.notes: No context on original request; genuinely ambiguous

cases.input: cant login. password reset link says expird. ALSO billed twice this week!!
cases.expected_summary: Customer cannot log in via an expired reset link and also reports a duplicate charge.
cases.notes: Two issues in one email (account + billing); primary blocking issue is login access

cases.input: wont load. keeps spining. tried refresh 10x
cases.expected_summary: Customer's app won't load and shows an infinite spinner despite refreshing.
cases.notes: Typos, terse phrasing

cases.input: Oh great, ANOTHER charge I didn't approve. Love that for me.
cases.expected_summary: Customer sarcastically complains about another unapproved charge.
cases.notes: Sarcastic tone should not obscure the billing intent

cases.input: Wow, three password resets and I STILL can't get in. Impressive.
cases.expected_summary: Customer sarcastically reports repeated failed password resets blocking login.
cases.notes: Sarcasm test, account category

cases.input: No me deja iniciar sesion, dice contraseña incorrecta aunque la acabo de cambiar.
cases.expected_summary: Customer (writing in Spanish) cannot log in despite recently changing their password.
cases.notes: Non-English input, mixed/foreign language edge case

cases.input: Je n'arrive pas à annuler mon abonnement, le bouton ne fonctionne pas.
cases.expected_summary: Customer (writing in French) cannot cancel their subscription because the button doesn't work.
cases.notes: French input; billing intent with a technical symptom

cases.input: billing page is broken, throws an error when I click 'update card', also is this the right place to ask about refunds?
cases.expected_summary: Customer hits an error updating their card and asks about the refund process.
cases.notes: Overlaps billing and technical; primary intent is a billing task

cases.input: idk who handles this but my account somehow has two emails linked and I only added one???
cases.expected_summary: Customer is confused why two email addresses are linked to their single account.
cases.notes: Casual tone, uncertainty markers

cases.input: URGENT!!! nothing works, everything is BROKEN, fix this NOW
cases.expected_summary: Customer reports the product is broken without specifying details, urgently.
cases.notes: No specifics, all caps urgency, must still classify as technical by default vagueness

cases.input: k
cases.expected_summary: Customer sent a one-character message with no content.
cases.notes: Minimal input edge case

cases.input: I love the product but the invoice PDF has a typo in our company name, can you fix that on file?
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests a correction to their company name on invoice records.

cases.input: The export button is greyed out for CSV but works fine for PDF, is that intentional?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks whether a disabled CSV export button is intentional.

cases.input: Please remove my card details entirely from your systems, I don't want you storing them.
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests removal of stored payment card details.

cases.input: Is there a way to see a login history for my account, I think someone else accessed it.
cases.expected_summary: Customer wants to review login history due to suspected unauthorized access.

cases.input: Quick question - what timezone does the scheduling feature use internally?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks which timezone the scheduling feature uses.

cases.input: Getting 'insufficient permissions' error even though I'm the account owner.
cases.expected_summary: Customer, despite being account owner, gets a permissions error.
cases.notes: Could plausibly be filed as account; core symptom is a permissions bug

cases.input: Can you explain what the 'usage overage' line item on my bill means?
cases.expected_summary: Customer asks for an explanation of a usage overage charge on their bill.

cases.input: The onboarding checklist won't mark step 3 as complete no matter what I do.
cases.expected_summary: Customer's onboarding checklist fails to mark a step complete.

cases.input: Any chance you could do a demo for our whole team next week?
cases.expected_summary: Customer requests a product demo for their team.

cases.input: my son used my laptop and now the account language is in korean and i cant read anything to change it back
cases.expected_summary: Customer's account language was changed and they need help reverting the setting.
cases.notes: Rambling, informal, settings-change edge case
